description_long: This object consists of two red aluminum cans, each featuring the iconic Coca-Cola branding in bold white script, with dynamic white and yellow swooshes and water droplet graphics suggesting coldness and refreshment. The cans are cylindrical with slightly indented tops and bottoms, and a glossy, reflective surface. One can is upright while the other lies horizontally, both displaying the brand name prominently. The upright can reveals a nutrition label and product information on its reverse side, while the tops of both cans show standard pull-tab openings. The cans are likely empty or filled with carbonated beverage, as suggested by their typical size and shape. The overall appearance is vibrant, commercial, and instantly recognizable as a popular soft drink container.
description: Two glossy red Coca-Cola cans with white branding, water droplets, and pull-tab tops, one upright and one lying down.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Coca-Cola logo in large white script and water droplet graphics on both cans.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the upright can's logo and the pull-tab top of the horizontal can.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the upright can's nutritional label and the bottom of the horizontal can.
description_view_3: Side view showing the upright can's product information and the full side of the horizontal can.
attribute_brand_logo: The Coca-Cola logo is visible on the front and sides of both cans, featuring white cursive script on a red background with yellow and white swooshes.
attribute_flavor_indication: The red color and Coca-Cola branding indicate the classic flavor; no other flavor cues are visible.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the upright can in small white text.
